# EdgeBase Rust SDK Workspace (`edgebase-sdk`)

This directory is the Rust SDK workspace root.

For real application code, prefer the narrower crates:

- `edgebase-admin`
  Trusted server-side SDK with Service Key access
- `edgebase-core`
  Lower-level primitives used by the admin crate and custom integrations

## Canonical Guidance

- Rust is server-side only in this repository.
- Prefer `edgebase_admin::EdgeBase::server(...)` for trusted application code.
- Use `edgebase_core` when the user explicitly asks for lower-level tables, storage, or transport primitives.
- The public crates.io release flow focuses on `edgebase-core` and `edgebase-admin`, not the `edgebase-sdk` workspace root.
- Keep Service Keys on trusted servers only.
- Follow Rust async and `serde` conventions rather than JavaScript promise-style examples.

## Package Boundaries

- `edgebase-sdk`
  Workspace root and release line tracker
- `edgebase-admin`
  Admin auth, database admin access, SQL, push, analytics, functions, KV, D1, and Vectorize
- `edgebase-core`
  HTTP client, refs, storage helpers, shared errors, and low-level building blocks

## Docs

- SDK Overview: https://edgebase.fun/docs/sdks
- Admin SDK Reference: https://edgebase.fun/docs/admin-sdk/reference
- Database Admin SDK: https://edgebase.fun/docs/database/admin-sdk
- Storage: https://edgebase.fun/docs/storage/upload-download
- Native Resources: https://edgebase.fun/docs/server/native-resources

## Install

- `cargo add edgebase-admin`
- `cargo add edgebase-core`
